---
title: "Projects"
---

## R Textbook

::: {.project-card}
### Data Analysis and Statistics in R
A freely available textbook (in Russian) covering data wrangling, visualization,
statistical testing, regression, and reproducible workflows using R and the tidyverse.

[Read the book](https://pozdniakov.github.io/tidy_stats/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[Source](https://github.com/Pozdniakov/tidy_stats){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

[R]{.tech-badge} [tidyverse]{.tech-badge} [bookdown]{.tech-badge} [statistics]{.tech-badge}
:::

## Drama Corpora Project (DraCor)

::: {.project-card}
### {rdracor} — CRAN Package
An R client for the DraCor API providing programmatic access to the Drama
Corpora Project — a multilingual collection of plays in TEI-XML. Retrieve
play texts, metadata, network data, and stage directions directly from R.

[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=rdracor){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/dracor-org/rdracor){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

[R]{.tech-badge} [CRAN]{.tech-badge} [API]{.tech-badge} [digital humanities]{.tech-badge}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### DraCor Shiny Application
An interactive web application for exploring the Drama Corpora Project data —
character interaction networks, corpus statistics, and dramatic text visualization.

[GitHub](https://github.com/dracor-org/dracor-shiny){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

[R]{.tech-badge} [Shiny]{.tech-badge} [network analysis]{.tech-badge}
:::

## Teaching & Streaming

::: {.project-card}
### Live-Coding Data Analysis — YouTube
Unscripted live streams working through real datasets in R: wrangling, visualization,
modeling, and reproducible research workflows.

[Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9giMhVoDQ0T3TPrx3qBgOQ){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

[R]{.tech-badge} [data analysis]{.tech-badge} [live-coding]{.tech-badge}
:::

## Research

::: {.project-card}
### Research Direction
My background is in experimental brain stimulation (TMS, tACS) and neuroimaging.
I am now moving toward computational modeling — bridging neural dynamics, cognition,
and behavior through mathematical models. I am looking for a PhD position
in this area and am also interested in the philosophy of mind.

[computational cognition]{.tech-badge} [neural dynamics]{.tech-badge} [modeling]{.tech-badge} [philosophy of mind]{.tech-badge}
:::
